channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Freeman and Notre Dame handle 'tough moments' and oust Georgia from CFP with 23-10 win in Sugar Bowl
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Notre Dame coach Marcus Freeman and the Fighting Irish found the right balance of family and football to produce a memorable performance under unprecedented, emotionally trying circumstances.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sugar Bowl's corporate sponsor CEO slammed for 'addiction to divisiveness' statement after terror attack
item.description: Allstate CEO Tom Wilson suggested Americans have an "addiction to divisiveness" in a statement that has prompted backlash after the New Orleans terror attack.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cam Skattebo sounds off on fan accusing ASU star running back of late night out before Peach Bowl
item.description: Arizona State’s Cam Skattebo fired back on a fan on social media Thursday after the star running back was accused of having a late night out before Wednesday's Peach Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alabama QB Jalen Milroe and LB Jihaad Campbell declare for NFL draft after bowl loss
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Alabama quarterback Jalen Milroe and linebacker Jihaad Campbell are entering the NFL draft. Milroe and Campbell announced decisions to skip their final seasons Thursday on social media, two days after the Crimson Tide fell to Michigan 19-13 in the ReliaQuest Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big 12 commissioner calls for 'national standards' for calling targeting after controversial play
item.description: Big 12 commissioner Brett Yormark is calling for more consistency on what constitutes a targeting penalty after no call was made on Texas safety Michael Taaffe’s high hit on Arizona State receiver Melquan Stovall late in the College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Peach Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Saints, Pelicans announce member of video production team among those killed in New Orleans terrorist attack
item.description: The New Orleans Saints and Pelicans announced a member of their video production team with ASM New Orleans was killed in the terror attack on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pistons guard Jaden Ivey sustains leg injury in victory over the Magic
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Detroit guard Jaden Ivey sustained what appeared to be a severe injury to his lower left leg in the fourth quarter of Detroit's victory over the Orlando Magic on Wednesday night. Orlando's Cole Anthony slipped and fell as he and Ivey went for the ball.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Camarillo High School to honor NBA star alumnus with jersey retirement
item.description: Camarillo High School will honor one of its most successful alumni when it retires the No. 24 jersey of Jaime Jaquez Jr. later this month.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Jimmy Garoppolo to make debut for playoff-bound Rams in place of Matthew Stafford against Seahawks
item.description: Jimmy Garoppolo will take his first snaps for the Rams when he starts in place of Matthew Stafford in playoff-bound Los Angeles' regular-season finale against Seattle on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (AP) — Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response. “CONGRATULATIONS MAXIMUS!!,” LeBron James posted.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Sugar Bowl postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS — The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame has been postponed after a truck plowed into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away early Wednesday, killing at least 10 people.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC loses fifth straight game, 4-1 to Edmonton
item.description: EDMONTON (ABC4 Sports) - Connor McDavid and Leon Draisaitl each extended their point streaks to 12 games for the Edmonton Oilers, who won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Rogers Place on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PHOTOS: Blues, Blackhawks close 2024 with the Winter Classic
item.description: It's Winter Classic Day in the Windy City on New Year's Eve. The ultimate outdoor hockey showdown between the cross-state rival St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks is underway.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Bears plan to start Caleb Williams, other healthy starters for season finale at Green Bay
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — The Bears plan to have Caleb Williams make one more start rather than hold their prized rookie quarterback out of the season finale at Green Bay.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Bills clinch the AFC's No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the undisciplined Jets
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen reflected on Buffalo’s many offseason critics and doubters when asked about the Bills achieving their latest milestones while sewing up the AFC’s No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the unraveling and undisciplined New York Jets on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFC's No. 1 seed comes down to Vikings-Lions showdown at Detroit in Week 18
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed will come down to the final game of the regular season when the Detroit Lions host the Minnesota Vikings next Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mavs star Luka Doncic is latest pro athlete whose home was burglarized, business manager says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Luka Doncic of the Dallas Mavericks is the latest professional athlete whose home has been burglarized. The star guard's business manager told multiple media outlets Saturday there was a break-in at Doncic's home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation
